element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns directional shooting and basic evasion
Introduces vertical threat variety alongside aerial threats
Core mechanic: collect all capsules on screen to earn modular powerup
First weapon variant expansion, alters shot pattern
Second weapon variant, increases firepower spread
Press transform button to split pieces into defensive triangle formation
Attach all four pieces and transform for temporary invulnerability; high-risk reward mechanic
Escalating enemy formations and attack patterns requiring accumulated weapon knowledge

typical_tension_triggers: Mixed air and ground threat simultaneous presence
Capsule collection requirement blocking forward progression
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arcade rhythm with cycle-based tension: enemy waves alternate with powerup collection windows; modular weapon system creates repeated micro-cycles of capability acquisition and tactical re-engagement

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible introduction to base mechanics: single weapon, linear enemy patterns, generous capsule collection sequences
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon variety integration and formation-switching complexity; enemy density increases; piece separation mechanic requires tactical positioning
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained enemy pressure; transformation mechanic becomes essential for survival; Mandler army patterns demand accumulated skill from all prior stages
notable_spikes: Late-stage Mandler formations with dense projectile patterns

notable_level_patterns.description: Discrete window where small capsules appear on ground; player must destroy all before earning modular ship piece. Blocks progression until completed. Creates rhythmic pause-and-execute gameplay phase distinct from pure combat.
Continuous upward scroll with mixed air and ground threats; player navigates between enemy formations while maintaining positioning for capsule collection and piece assembly.

Four distinct ship pieces each provide unique firing pattern (wave gun, double shot, etc.). Accumulated pieces compound effectiveness and act as stacking shields. Encourages capsule collection as both offensive and defensive strategy.

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor: Terra Cresta (NES)
wikipedia - Terra Cresta article, Gameplay section
